---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Problem / Motivation**  
Describe the problem or limitation you currently face in Lubex Compiler.  
For example: "IRStruct node currently cannot handle default initializers for class members."

**Proposed solution**  
Describe the feature or improvement you would like to see implemented.  
For example: "Add support for default initializers in Token generation."

**Alternatives considered**  
Describe any alternative solutions you have considered, if applicable.  
For example: "Manually initialize each class member after construction."

**Additional context / Notes**  
Add any other context, screenshots, or references that could help explain the feature request.
